---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#20: graphQL & noSQL, openCode AI (III)`` (April 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| **#20** | 67 | 27/04/2026 | - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </BR> (1) **new data model**  </br> (2) 3 items: person, course and calendar </br> (3) dynamoDB SDK Java queries </br> (4) refactor `personService` | - [noSqlPerson: 8c2a3d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/18c2a3dd54b9a2a572e6a97db20ca34f67f18a75){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [noSqlPerson: 02a9ec](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/02a9ec09b117254f4475cfad7068769cc27daf07){.external target='_blank'}  </br>    - [SpreadSheet NoSql person](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYVKKlaXtwYl7nI-MfBhrRZpycEDlwbtR0srz7UiSLg/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br>   |
|  | 68 | 28/04/2026 | - GraphQL **Full Stack Project** </br> (1) Understand the needs </br> (2) Create roles/teams </br> (3) Create rules/tools </br> (4) Create sprint plan </br> (5) Create requirements docs for openCode AI </br> (6) Create implementation details    | - [Project: realtime Polymarket](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/Real-TimePolymarket.md){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 69 | 29/04/2026 | - openCode AI + Memory implementation |  |

: Backlog Sprint#20 April 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
